data.title: Add JSONL schema comment block to apply-attribution-trailers.sh
data.description: This task is folded into T3a-impl: the schema comment block should be written as part of creating the script skeleton in T3a-impl. If T3a-impl was executed without the schema comment, add a comment block at the top of plugins/dso/scripts/apply-attribution-trailers.sh documenting: JSONL format (one JSON object per line), agent entry format, skill entry format, multi-value trailers (DSO-Agent/DSO-Skill/DSO-Model), scalar trailers (DSO-Task/Story/Epic/Jira-Ticket/DSO-Review-Score), and truncation contract (cleared to 0 bytes after each successful git commit exit 0). TDD exemption: Unit exemption criteria 1 (no conditional logic) and 3 (static assets -- comment block with no executable paths). AC: schema comment present at top of script; validate.sh --ci passes.
